5:["$","li","2",{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":"$0:rsc:props:children:0:props:children:4:props:children:0:props:children:props:children:props:children:1:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-chevron-right text-stone-300 shrink-0","size":13}],["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Workspace","className":"hover:text-orange-500 transition-colors","children":"Workspace"}]]}]
6:["$","li","3",{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":"$0:rsc:props:children:0:props:children:4:props:children:0:props:children:props:children:props:children:1:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-chevron-right text-stone-300 shrink-0","size":13}],["$","span",null,{"className":"text-stone-600 font-medium line-clamp-1","children":"The Art of Desk Minimalism: Why Less is More Productive"}]]}]
7:["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 sm:p-8 mt-4 shadow-lg border border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 mb-10","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 leading-tight mb-5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"The Art of Desk Minimalism: Why Less is More Productive"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4 text-sm text-stone-400","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/authors/tom-hadley","className":"flex items-center gap-2 group","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500648767791-00dcc994a43e?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Tom Hadley","className":"w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"Tom Hadley"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Ergonomics Specialist"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","6 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"February 18, 2026"}]]}]]}]
8:["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-10 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"A clear desk is not just aesthetically pleasing — there is real neuroscience behind why visual clutter destroys focus."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"the-science-of-visual-noise","children":"The Science of Visual Noise"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Every object within your visual field competes for your brain's attention. Not consciously — you are not actively thinking about the coffee mug or the pile of papers — but your visual cortex is processing them constantly, allocating a thin slice of cognitive resource to each one."}}],["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A Princeton neuroscience study found that physical clutter in your environment competes for your attention and reduces your capacity to process information. A messy desk is not just disorganised — it is actively making you less capable of focused thought."}}],["$","h2","3",{"id":"the-minimalist-desk-what-it-is-and-is-not","children":"The Minimalist Desk: What It Is (and Is Not)"}],["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Desk minimalism is not about having an empty surface that looks good in photos. It is about having a surface that contains exactly what you need for your current work and nothing else."}}],["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The standard to aim for: <strong>everything on your desk has a reason to be there today</strong>. Not this week. Not \"just in case\". Today."}}],["$","h2","6",{"id":"the-one-touch-rule","children":"The One-Touch Rule"}],["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Every item on your desk should require only one action to use. Your keyboard — one touch, you type. Your notebook — one touch, you write. Your water bottle — one touch, you drink."}}],["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Items that require two steps to use (opening a drawer, uncoiling a cable, moving something else out of the way) should not live on the desk surface. They belong in a drawer or elsewhere."}}],["$","h2","9",{"id":"the-daily-clear","children":"The Daily Clear"}],["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"At the end of every workday, return the desk to its baseline state. Put away everything that does not belong. File the papers. Cap the pens. Close the notebooks."}}],["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"This ritual takes three to five minutes. It is not primarily about tidiness — it is about creating a psychological clean break between work and not-work. And it means you start the next morning with a clear surface and a clear mind."}}],["$","h2","12",{"id":"what-belongs-on-a-minimalist-desk","children":"What Belongs on a Minimalist Desk"}],["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A genuinely minimal desk typically contains:"}}],["$","ul","14",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Monitor (on an arm)</strong> — off the surface, tilted to exactly the right angle"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Keyboard and mouse or trackpad</strong> — centred, close together"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>A single notebook</strong> — for capturing thoughts by hand during the day"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>One pen</strong> — one is enough"}}],["$","li","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>A water bottle or glass</strong> — hydration matters"}}],"$Lb"]}],"$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17"]}],"$L18","$L19","$L1a"]}],"$L1b"]}]
9:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
a:["$","$L1c",null,{"children":["$","$1d",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@1e"}]}]
b:["$","li","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Lamp</strong> — if needed for task lighting"}}]
c:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"That is it. Everything else is noise."}}]
d:["$","h2","16",{"id":"cable-discipline-is-non-negotiable","children":"Cable Discipline is Non-Negotiable"}]
e:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The single greatest enemy of a minimalist desk is cables. A wireless keyboard, wireless mouse, and a single USB-C cable from laptop to monitor hub transforms a tangled nest into a near-cable-free surface."}}]
f:["$","p","18",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If wireless is not an option for everything, route cables down the back of a monitor arm, clip them along desk legs, and hide the excess in a cable tray mounted underneath. Invisible cables do not compete for your attention."}}]
10:["$","h2","19",{"id":"dealing-with-paper","children":"Dealing with Paper"}]
11:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Paper is the natural enemy of the minimalist desk. It accumulates silently and builds into a monument to procrastination."}}]
12:["$","p","21",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The solution is a simple two-folder system: <strong>In</strong> (things to process) and <strong>Archive</strong> (things processed and kept). Nothing else lives on the desk. Process your In folder daily. Archive weekly."}}]
13:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"For most people, 95% of what ends up in Archive can actually be thrown away. Be ruthless."}}]
14:["$","h2","23",{"id":"the-psychological-payoff","children":"The Psychological Payoff"}]
15:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"After two weeks of maintaining a clear desk, most people notice something unexpected: they feel less anxious at the start of the workday. The desk is no longer an accusing reminder of unfinished business. It is a neutral, ready surface."}}]
16:["$","blockquote","25",{"children":"\"You cannot think clearly in a cluttered environment. Clarity of surface invites clarity of mind.\""}]
17:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The minimal desk is not a productivity hack. It is a foundation. Build on a clear surface."}}]
18:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Workspace","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Workspace"}],[["$","$L3","minimalism",{"href":"/blog/tag/minimalism","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","minimalism"]}],["$","$L3","organization",{"href":"/blog/tag/organization","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","organization"]}],["$","$L3","clean-desk",{"href":"/blog/tag/clean-desk","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","clean-desk"]}],["$","$L3","mindset",{"href":"/blog/tag/mindset","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","mindset"]}]]]}]
